rationale.fidelity: Correctly makes the minute-five incumbent the executable outcome and preserves the routing-and-lateness objective and feasibility constraints.
rationale.managerial_framing: Provides a concrete actor, trigger, choices, stakes, mechanism, trade-off, comparator, and operational cutoff implication.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Bounds the research question and comparator but does not provide a traceable literature position.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Separates the hypothesis of better early incumbents from established superiority and specifies fair comparative testing.
rationale.prose_clarity: Comprehensive but excessively templated and repetitive, with substantial encoding artifacts.
rationale.overall: Excellent deadline-sensitive framing and evidence discipline; prose economy and rendering quality limit the score.
